item.name: Get list of all validation results

request.name: Get list of all validation results

description.content: Returns the validation results of a document.

query.description: The number of documents to skip before starting to collect the result set.
The numbers of results to return.

variable.description: The instance region. Use 'api' for AUS/Global, 'api.us1' for US, or 'api.eu1' for EU. You can find your region in the Affinda web app URL. (This can only be one of api,api.eu1,api.us1)

response.name: All matching workspace memberships.

variable.description: The instance region. Use 'api' for AUS/Global, 'api.us1' for US, or 'api.eu1' for EU. You can find your region in the Affinda web app URL. (This can only be one of api,api.eu1,api.us1)

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

response.body:

  {
    "id": 1,
    "annotations": [
      1,
      2,
      3
    ],
    "passed": true,
    "ruleSlug": "supplier-name-is-alphanumeric",
    "message": "Expected 'ThisInputShouldMatch' to match regex pattern '[0-9]*",
    "document": "<string>"
  },
